name: hebrew-book-producer
description: Hebrew non-fiction book production pipeline — lectorship, literary editing, linguistic editing, proofreading, and typesetting for ספרי עיון, אוטוביוגרפיה, ופילוסופיה. Bridges CandleKeep (writer's guide), Superpowers (long-context analysis), and Metaswarm (agent orchestration).
